summary: Validated all 3 P0 fixes (Review submit flow, Notification fan-out + polling, ChatLobby 3-section restructure + CreateChannelModal). Backend: 22/22 pytest pass (15 regression + 7 new P0 tests). Frontend: ChatLobby sections render correctly, VN user country filter works (only ch_vn visible), emoji-grid selection highlight works, channel_name_too_short toast triggers in Korean, valid create auto-opens new channel, reviews-updated custom event switches tab correctly, /notifications polled on mount + visibility.

minor.issue: Auto-seeds 3 demo notifications for empty users; ok for MVP but real notifications may be diluted by the seed batch.

When no chat_members rows exist, notification fan-out falls back to channel.created_by only — global/country channels (no members) will silently skip all subscribers. Acceptable for MVP but flag for scale.

issues: Section count badge next to label always shows raw channel count (e.g. '내 나라 1') — minor UX; consider hiding when count <= 1.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py now 922 lines — strongly recommend splitting into routers (auth, posts, petitions, reviews, chat, notifications, translate) and a seed module before further feature work.

Notification fan-out for chat depends on chat_members rows; the seed data populates default channels but never inserts member rows for them, so messages in ch_global/ch_vn/etc. notify only the channel.created_by (None for seeds → zero notifications). Consider auto-joining users on channel open or storing membership lazily.
push_notification swallows insert exceptions with a warning — fine for resilience but make sure ops dashboards surface these rates.
CreateChannelModal: channel created via POST always sets channel_type='interest' server-side, ignoring any client request — good design but undocumented in the API contract.

Reviews.jsx useEffect for imta:reviews-updated re-registers listener whenever category changes (deps include category+load). Works but could be simplified by using a ref for current category to avoid re-binding.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_imta_backend.py (loosened drift-sensitive assertions for petition counts + default channel count)
test_credentials: session_token=test_session_1779718769701 (테스트 user, country_code=VN, onboarded). Auth via Cookie or Authorization: Bearer.
seed_data_creation: Test channels and reviews with TEST_ prefix created during pytest run; not cleaned up but isolated by prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 fixes pass backend + UI verification. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_imta_p0_fixes.py covers: review POST shape, chat channel icon persistence, country channel VN presence, comment/signature/chat self-notification suppression, core endpoint regression. Frontend tested at viewport 390x844. Key testids: fab-chat-lobby, chat-lobby, create-channel-btn, create-channel-modal, emoji-grid, emoji-{char}, channel-name-input, channel-desc-input, channel-submit-btn, chat-back, chat-input, review-cat-{id}, channel-ch_vn. Custom event `imta:reviews-updated` with detail.category switches Review tab correctly.
tested_features: POST /api/reviews returns review_id, category, place_name, rating, content, author (nickname=테스트) — verified
POST /api/chat/channels persists icon (🚴) and returns it on subsequent GET — verified
Channel from POST has channel_type='interest', country_code=null — verified
Comment on others' post: no self-notification leaked for commenter — verified
Self-sign on own petition: no signature self-notification — verified
Self chat message in own channel: no chat self-notification — verified
ChatLobby renders Global, Country (only VN for test user), Interest sections with create button — verified
CreateChannelModal: emoji grid 30 chars, click selects (bg-imta highlight) — verified
Name < 2 chars triggers toast '채팅방 이름은 최소 2자 이상이어야 합니다' — verified
Valid create closes modal and auto-opens chat window (chat-back+chat-input visible) — verified
Reviews page: dispatching imta:reviews-updated event switches active category tab — verified
NotificationContext: 2 /notifications fetches observed within ~5s (mount + visibilitychange). 30s setInterval verified in source.
